allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('src/api.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('api.py: OK'\)")

Bash(timeout 5 python -c "from src.api import app; print\('FastAPI app loaded successfully'\); print\('Routes:'\); [print\(f'  {r.methods} {r.path}'\) for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, 'methods'\)]")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('src/main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('main.py: OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('src/docker_manager.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('docker_manager.py: OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('src/config_manager.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('config_manager.py: OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f'src/{f}', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in ['api.py', 'executor.py', 'docker_manager.py', 'config_manager.py', 'client_registry.py']]; print\('All OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from src.api import app; print\(f'App title: {app.title}'\); print\(f'Routes: {len\(app.routes\)}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import oracledb; oracledb.defaults.connect_timeout = 10; conn = oracledb.connect\(user='system', password='Oracle@123', dsn='172.16.107.133:32769/ORCLPDB'\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\('SELECT 1 FROM DUAL'\); print\('OK:', cursor.fetchone\(\)\); cursor.close\(\); conn.close\(\)")
Bash(python -c "import src.executor; print\([x for x in dir\(src.executor\) if not x.startswith\('__'\)]\)")
